title: Cheesy Situation
body:
Adds alot of different cheeses, that when eaten give special effects.
The Cheeses in question:
* End Cheese (gives slow falling when eaten)
* Cheddar (gives strength when eaten)
* Swiss Cheese (gives haste when eaten)
* Feta Cheese (gives resistance when eaten)
* Bastion Cheddar (gives fire resistance when eaten)
  All of these can be cut up in a stone cutter so you can have more.



If You have any questions please contact me on discord (boxedboi)
